content:
Announcement post just went up on the BA blog: https://bytecodealliance.org/articles/WASI-0.3

Congrats and thank you to everyone (!!) who worked on this for the past two years! There are many more features we're working on in the component model, but I think it's safe to say this may have been the biggest one.

Hope y'all have a great weekend, and I know I'll be celebrating for sure. Yay, we did it!! :tada:
